sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁנא

Transliteration: shenâ'

Phonetic: shen-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to change, be altered, be changed
    1. (Peal) to change, be changed
    2. (Pael) to change, transform, frustrate
      1. different (participle)
    3. (Ithpael) to be changed
    4. (Aphel) to change, alter

Origin: corresponding to H8132

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Verb
